Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is not visually clear and lacks graphical representation, making it difficult for stakeholders to understand. It uses text-based PlantUML code rather than a visual diagram, which is not easily interpretable by non-technical stakeholders.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram is incomplete as it does not visually represent the components and connections present in the ground truth diagram. It lacks the detailed components and their relationships shown in the ground truth.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram is not consistent with the ground truth. It uses a different format (text-based code) and does not maintain the same structural or semantic elements as the ground truth diagram.
